overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene showing two characters seated on snowy steps overlooking a historic European town square at dusk. Snow falls gently as scattered NPCs walk through the plaza, with gothic architecture and a central fountain visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered historic town square with central fountain

agents.ego_description: sitting on stone steps next to a companion, quietly observing the town square and falling snow

notable_agents.action: figure in yellow coat standing near the plaza edge, facing away from camera
pedestrian walking slowly across the snowy plaza toward the fountain

entered.detail: large historic stone cathedral with spires dominating the background skyline
circular stone fountain structure in the center of the plaza
open square covered in snow with visible footprints and tracks
low stone wall or steps where the two characters are seated
decorative metal railing running along the left side of the viewing area

segments.scene_description: Two characters sit on stone steps at the edge of a snow-covered historic town square during a quiet winter dusk. The camera remains stationary behind them, framing a view of a large gothic cathedral in the distance and a central stone fountain. Scattered NPCs walk slowly through the plaza, including a figure in a yellow coat standing to the left, while snow falls gently over the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, contemplative perspective from behind two characters seated on snowy stone steps, overlooking a historic town square at winter dusk. It begins with a wide, stationary frame that captures the quiet atmosphere of the plaza, where snow falls gently over the cobblestones. As the gaze lingers, the view emphasizes the distance between the foreground figures and the imposing gothic cathedral and central stone fountain that anchor the square. The scene remains poised in this stillness, observing scattered NPCs, including a figure in a yellow coat, as they move slowly through the dimming light of the evening.
